title: GB to MB Converter
shortDescription: Convert gigabytes to megabytes instantly with the binary 1024-based ratio used in many storage calculations.
metaTitle: GB to MB Converter (1 GB = 1024 MB)
metaDescription: Convert GB to MB online with the binary 1024-based ratio. Use this GB to MB converter for file sizes, storage planning and quick size checks.
intro: Need a quick answer for GB to MB? This converter uses the binary storage ratio, where 1 GB equals 1024 MB, so you can check file sizes, storage plans and download limits without doing the math manually.
overview: This GB to MB converter is built for the common search intent behind queries like convert GB to MB, how many MB in a GB and 1 GB to MB. It focuses on the binary 1024-based convention often used in operating systems and file size calculations, and it gives a fast result directly in the browser.
howItWorks: Enter the number of gigabytes you want to convert.
The tool multiplies the value by 1024 using the binary storage formula.
Review the result in megabytes and continue with related storage tools if needed.
useCases: Check how many MB are in a file size shown in GB.
Estimate storage requirements before downloads or backups.
Compare hosting, cloud or device storage limits.
Convert GB to MB for technical documentation or spreadsheets.

faq.question: Which ratio does this converter use?
faq.answer: This tool uses the binary storage ratio, so 1 GB equals 1024 MB.

faq.question: Why does this page use 1024 instead of 1000?
faq.answer: Many storage and memory calculations use the binary convention, where 1 GB equals 1024 MB. Some marketing materials use decimal units, so always check which convention you need.

faq.question: Can I use this GB to MB converter on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes. The converter works on desktop and mobile screens with a simple input and instant result.
